bird.name: Peruvian plantcutter
bird.summary: The Peruvian plantcutter (Phytotoma raimondii) is an Vulnerable species of bird in the family Cotingidae, the cotingas. It is endemic to Pe…

locations.name: 通贝斯大区
locations.summary: 通貝斯大區（西班牙語：Departamento de Tumbes）是秘魯西北部的一個大區，西臨太平洋，東接厄瓜多爾。面積4,045.86平方公里，2007年人口191,713人。首府通貝斯。 1942年11月25日建區，2005年曾經舉…

locations.name: 安卡什大区
locations.summary: 安卡什区（西班牙语：Ancash）是秘鲁北部的一个行政区，首府瓦拉斯，最大城市钦博特。该区北接拉利伯塔德區，东邻瓦努科大区、帕斯科大区，南连利馬區，西濒太平洋。安卡什区区名源于克丘亚语“anqash”一词，意为“蓝”。秘鲁最高峰瓦斯卡兰峰…

relations.subject: Peruvian plantcutter
relations.evidence: The Peruvian plantcutter is found in coastal northern Peru from Tumbes Department south to Ancash Department

relations.subject: Peruvian plantcutter
relations.evidence: The Peruvian plantcutter is found in coastal northern Peru from Tumbes Department south to Ancash Department

relations.subject: Peruvian plantcutter
relations.evidence: It inhabits a variety of dry to arid landscapes including dry forest with a shrubby understory, desert scrublands, and thickets along watercourses through dry areas
